case_title: LUIS JIMENEZ VS. BLACKROCK PARTNERSHIP, LLC.

docket_entries.description: REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, LUIS ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT BLACKROCK PARTNERSHIP, LLC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, LUIS IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT BLACKROCK PARTNERSHIP, LLC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-23-2016, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT BLACKROCK PARTNERSHIP, LLC.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,000.00 FILED BY JIMENEZ, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT BLACKROCK PARTNERSHIP, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-18-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF JIMENEZ, LUIS AS TO DEFENDANT BLACKROCK PARTNERSHIP, LLC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-18-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-18-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT, ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPRETER FRANCISCO MERCADO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J.BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-18-2016 - JUDGMENT.
